name: HadSST4-gridded
citation: Kennedy, J. J. et al. (2019). An ensemble data set of sea surface temperature change from 1850: the Met Office Hadley Centre HadSST.4.0.0.0 data set. Journal of Geophysical Research: Atmospheres.
data_citation: Met Office Hadley Centre. HadSST.4.2.0.0 gridded median SST anomaly NetCDF. https://www.metoffice.gov.uk/hadobs/hadsst4/data/download.html.
acknowledgement: HadSST.4.2.0.0 data were obtained from http://www.metoffice.gov.uk/hadobs/hadsst4 and are British Crown Copyright, Met Office, provided under an Open Government Licence.
notes: Separate gridded SST anomaly metadata for optional spatial processing. This collection must not be selected by the strict six-output global SST reference workflow.

datasets.long_name: HadSST4 monthly gridded median sea-surface temperature anomaly
